name: Oxylabs MCP Server
what_it_does: Official Oxylabs MCP server enabling AI agents to scrape the web using Oxylabs' residential proxy network and scraping APIs — bypassing anti-bot protections, extracting structured data from web pages, and integrating Oxylabs' enterprise-grade web data collection into agent-driven research and data pipeline workflows.
use_cases: Scraping anti-bot protected websites via residential proxies from data extraction agents
Extracting e-commerce pricing and product data from market research agents
Gathering competitive intelligence from web data agents
Collecting structured data at scale from data pipeline agents
Bypassing geo-restrictions for international web data from geo-aware agents
Real estate and job listing data extraction from industry agents
not_for: Free or low-cost scraping (Oxylabs is a premium enterprise service)
Simple static HTML scraping (overkill; use lighter tools)
Teams without Oxylabs account and budget
best_when: An agent needs to scrape heavily protected or geo-restricted websites at scale — Oxylabs' residential proxies bypass most anti-bot measures that trip up simpler scrapers.
avoid_when: You need basic scraping without anti-bot challenges — much cheaper alternatives exist. Oxylabs is for enterprise data collection needs.

auth.notes: Oxylabs username and password required. Account must have active subscription. API credentials provided on account creation.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free trial credits available on signup
pricing.notes: Enterprise pricing. Official MCP from Oxylabs. Free trial available. Production use requires paid subscription.

known_agent_gotchas: Cost per request is significant — agents can run up bills quickly in loops
Scraping target sites may still have legal/ToS restrictions even with residential proxies
Response times are slow due to proxy routing (2-10 seconds per request)
Official MCP from Oxylabs — well-maintained and documented
Credit card required even for trial
Respect robots.txt and legal requirements regardless of proxy capability
agent_readiness.security_notes: HTTPS enforced. Oxylabs credentials. Official MCP. Monitor usage to control costs. Comply with target site ToS and legal requirements.

security_score_components.security_notes: HTTPS. Credentials. Official MCP. Comply with ToS. Monitor costs.
